warnings: Dropped 1 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Penalty Points (Staff Only)). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Demonstrates understanding of the role play and defines problem(s) to be solved
criteria.description: Shows comprehension of the simulated scenario and clearly identifies the issue(s) that need resolution.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant offered neither an overview of the scenario nor any identified problems.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant either presented an overview of the scenario or identified the problem(s).

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant both presented an overview of the scenario and identified the problem(s).

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant showcased a thorough understanding of the scenario's summary and precisely articulated the problem(s).

criteria.name: Communicates position on role play scenario
criteria.description: Clearly articulates a stance regarding the simulated situation.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant did not express any viewpoint.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant expressed a viewpoint, but it was irrelevant to the core issue.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant expressed a viewpoint directly addressing the core issue.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant professionally conveyed their viewpoint concerning the core issue within the scenario.

criteria.name: Identifies logical solution and aspects of implementation
criteria.description: Proposes a sensible resolution and outlines how it would be put into practice.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No resolution was presented.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A resolution was offered, but a strategy for putting it into action was missing.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A reasonable resolution was presented, along with a developed strategy for its execution.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A practical resolution and a detailed execution strategy were developed, including the identification of required resources.

criteria.name: Displays empathy/diplomacy when responding to role play scenario
criteria.description: Shows understanding and tact in their reactions to the simulated situation.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No understanding or tact was demonstrated.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Either understanding or tact was evident in the response to the simulated situation.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Both understanding and tact were evident in the response to the simulated situation.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The demonstration of understanding and tact significantly contributed to resolving the simulated situation.

criteria.name: Demonstrates conflict resolution and closure to the role play
criteria.description: Shows the ability to resolve disagreements and bring the simulated situation to a conclusion.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The situation was not brought to a close.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The situation was concluded OR the disagreement was resolved.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The disagreement was resolved, and the situation reached a conclusion.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The disagreement was resolved, the situation reached a conclusion, and the client (judge) expressed satisfaction.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated
criteria.description: The remarks made are structured logically and expressed with clarity.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant did not seem ready.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant was ready, but the delivery lacked a coherent progression.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation followed a coherent progression.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation followed a coherent progression, and the remarks were well-structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.
criteria.description: Regularly exhibits self-assurance, composed body language, engaging eye contact, and effective vocal projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the specified abilities were shown.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the specified abilities (self-assurance, body language, eye contact, or vocal projection) were shown.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the specified abilities (self-assurance, body language, eye contact, or vocal projection) were shown.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All abilities were shown, which improved the overall delivery.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions
criteria.description: Shows the capacity to provide thorough responses to inquiries.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant was unable to respond to inquiries.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant did not provide full responses to inquiries.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant provided full responses to inquiries.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant engaged with the judges while providing full responses to inquiries.
